zh.Soothill, West Riding, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭越可爾素爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Soothill I於1270年出生在英國越可爾素爾時，他的父親John de Soothill II26歲，母親Sothill26歲。他於大約1299年與Riling在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年4月在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.Soothill, West Riding, Yorkshire, Englan: 英国英格兰越可爾素爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Soothill I于1270年出生在英国越可爾素爾时，他的父亲John de Soothill II26岁，母亲Sothill26岁。他于大约1299年与Riling在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年4月在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Soothill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Soothill (in Dewsbury, WR Yorks).

variants.name: Suttle
meanings: nickname from Middle English sotil, sutel ‘subtle, clever, cunning’ (Old French sotil).
habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Southwell
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Soothill I was born in 1270, in Soothill, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Soothill II, was 26 and his mother, Sothill, was 26. He married Riling about 1299, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in April 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Soothill I est né en 1270, à Soothill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Soothill II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sothill, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Riling environ 1299, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Soothill I 1270 in Soothill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Soothill II 26 und seine Mutter Sothill 26. Er hat um 1299 in England Riling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im April 1343 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Soothill I è nato il nel 1270 nel Soothill, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John de Soothill II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Sothill, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Riling circa 1299, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Soothill, Yorkshire, Engand: イギリスヨークシュアイアソオスイル
ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Soothill Iが1270年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソオスイルで生まれた時，父John de Soothill IIは26歳，母Sothillは26歳であった。約1299年にイギリスでRilingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年4月に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Soothill I(이)가 1270년 영국 요르크실르 소스이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Soothill II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sothill(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1299년 영국에서 Riling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 4월 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Soothill, West Riding, Yorkshire, Englan: Soothill, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Soothill I nasceu em 1270, em Soothill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Soothill II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sothill, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Riling aproximadamente 1299, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Soothill I родился в 1270 г. в местности сутилл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Soothill II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sothill, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Riling около 1299 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер апрель 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Soothill I nació en 1270, en Soothill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Soothill II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Sothill, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Riling aproximadamente 1299, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en abril de 1343, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
